title: CORRECTED MEMO 03.23.26 Weekly Reports Public Records Request, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Services Requests
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: March 26, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Esha Singh, Management Assistant
DEPT: City Manager's Office
SUBJECT: 03.23.26 Weekly Reports: Public Records Request, Media Requests,
and Code Enforcement Services Requests
This memorandum includes weekly reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic
Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council for March 13, 2026
through March 19, 2026.
The following reports are attached:
• Public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office (attachment A)
• Weekly media requests received by Strategic Communications (attachment B)
• Weekly code enforcement service requests received by Code Enforcement (attachment C)

fields.tldr: This memo from the City Manager's Office transmits weekly reports to the Mayor and City Council covering March 13–19, 2026. The reports include public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office, media requests handled by Strategic Communications, and code enforcement service requests. The attached logs detail individual requests by reference number, date, requester, and category.
fields.key_stats: The public records log (run date 03/20/2026) lists dozens of requests submitted on 3/13/2026 and 3/14/2026, spanning Police Department Records (police reports, background requests, body worn camera video, traffic accidents, FBI NICS), Fire Department Records (investigation reports, fire prevention records), and General Public Records (building plans/permits, 911 dispatch logs, sewer/GIS mapping, business licenses, contracts/ordinances, environmental assessments, capital projects).
fields.action_items: Mayor and City Council to review attached weekly reports: (A) Public Records Requests from City Clerk's Office, (B) Media Requests from Strategic Communications, (C) Code Enforcement Service Requests from Code Enforcement.
